title: PR Review → Telegram Feedback
summary: OpenCode ships the change, opens the PR, and OpenClaw reviews the diff and sends merge-ready feedback into Telegram.

title: Wine Cellar Skill in Minutes
summary: A local wine cellar skill built from a sample CSV export, with storage decisions and testing handled through chat.

title: SNAG Screenshot-to-Markdown
summary: Hotkey a screen region, run vision on it, and drop clean Markdown straight into your clipboard.

title: Beeper CLI
summary: Read, send, and archive messages through Beeper Desktop so agents can work across iMessage, WhatsApp, and the rest.
